chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3968 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc No.13691/2021 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2021 Mr. Muhammad Khalid, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. The goods have already been released provisionally and the appeal is pending before Customs Tribunal. Consequently, there is no use of getting this lis pending as the matter is subjudice before the Customs Tribunal. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with direction that the fate of security lying with the Nazir shall be subject to the outcome of the Tribunal’s decision. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
